input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.5.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.5.3.2
            TITLE: a driver(s) must complete the driver cockpit checks to pass mechanical inspection

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5.3.2: A driver(s) must complete the Driver Cockpit Checks to pass Mechanical Inspection
IN.5.3.2 A driver(s) must complete the Driver Cockpit Checks to pass Mechanical Inspection

final_answer: A driver(s) must complete the Driver Cockpit Checks to pass Mechanical Inspection
